    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "pipeline_config_div_name.py"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "----------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "Run 1 profile with **div_name** in the model and division-aware CR plots."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "In **Cell 0** of 520 set:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    pip_config_file = 'pipeline_config_div_name'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "Requires: DIVISION_CONFIG merge + re-run CELL 7→9→10 so df_cox carries div_name."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "Optional PDE lookup (if you build it in 503): set DIVISION_CONFIG['uic_div_lookup_file']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    to 'df_uic_div_lookup_pde' and ensure that feather exists."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "from pipeline_config import *"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "# RUN 1: Individual TB ratio vs pool minus mean (one place for scale + variables)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "# Set RUN_SCALE to 'raw' or 'z' to control model, CR plots, PE plots, and interaction plots."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "RUN_SCALE = 'z'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "# One-swipe defaults for all CR plots (used by automated plots and by individual plots when USE_OVERRIDE_CR_PLOTS is True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "# Keep default group_by None so only plots that override it use div_name."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "RUN_CR_PLOT_DEFAULTS = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    'group_by': None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    'plot_type': 'competing_risks',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    'bin_continuous': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    'n_bins': 8,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    'cif_bar_hspace': 0.1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    # Key name must match cox_plot_helpers.plot_competing_risks_cif_bars (cif_bar_show_legend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    'cif_bar_show_legend': False,  # set True to show legend on CIF bar plots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    'bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    'min_group_size': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    'use_time_varying': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    'filter_zero_oer': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    'filter_nan_variable': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    'filter_nan_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    'strict_equal_n': False,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    'x_min_days': None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    'x_max_days': 4500,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    'bin_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    'group_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    'group_bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "# Quadratics: set in one place here via quadratic_bases. Order of operations (in Cell 10.5): raw → square → then z-score the square if RUN_SCALE is 'z'."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 156,
            "line": 44
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./pipeline_config_div_name.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.414641797542572
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 825,
            "text": "def plot_competing_risks_cif_bars("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 826,
            "text": "    plot_df,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 827,
            "text": "    plot_spec,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 828,
            "text": "    metadata,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 829,
            "text": "    output_dir=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 830,
            "text": "    filename_base=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 831,
            "text": "    dpi=300,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 832,
            "text": "    figsize=(10, 9),"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 833,
            "text": "    legend_outside=True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 834,
            "text": "):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 835,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 836,
            "text": "    Plot bar charts of final CIF by bin for promotion and attrition."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 837
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 838,
            "text": "    Bars are ordered by the mean of the plotted variable (ascending),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 839,
            "text": "    which yields z-score ascending order when plotting z-scored variables."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 840,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 841,
            "text": "    if plot_df is None or plot_df.empty:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 842,
            "text": "        print(\"⚠️ No data for CIF bar plots.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 843,
            "text": "        return None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 844
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 845,
            "text": "    var_name = plot_spec.get(\"variable\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 846,
            "text": "    group_col = \"plot_group\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 847,
            "text": "    if group_col not in plot_df.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 848,
            "text": "        print(\"⚠️ plot_group missing; cannot build CIF bars.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 849,
            "text": "        return None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 850
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 851,
            "text": "    # Compute per-group stats"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 852,
            "text": "    group_stats = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 853,
            "text": "    for group, gdf in plot_df.groupby(group_col):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 854,
            "text": "        # Match competing-risks filtering: require valid stop_time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 855,
            "text": "        if \"stop_time\" in gdf.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 856,
            "text": "            gdf = gdf[gdf[\"stop_time\"].notna() \u0026 (gdf[\"stop_time\"] \u003e 0)].copy()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 857,
            "text": "        n = len(gdf)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 858,
            "text": "        if n == 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 859,
            "text": "            continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 860,
            "text": "        promo_rate = (gdf[\"event\"] == 1).sum() / n if \"event\" in gdf.columns else np.nan"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 861,
            "text": "        attr_rate = (gdf[\"event\"] == 2).sum() / n if \"event\" in gdf.columns else np.nan"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 862,
            "text": "        if var_name and var_name in gdf.columns:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 863,
            "text": "            mean_val = pd.to_numeric(gdf[var_name], errors=\"coerce\").mean()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 864,
            "text": "            min_val = pd.to_numeric(gdf[var_name], errors=\"coerce\").min()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 865,
            "text": "            max_val = pd.to_numeric(gdf[var_name], errors=\"coerce\").max()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 866,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 867,
            "text": "            mean_val = min_val = max_val = np.nan"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 868,
            "text": "        group_stats.append({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 869,
            "text": "            \"group\": group,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 870,
            "text": "            \"n\": n,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 871,
            "text": "            \"promo_rate\": promo_rate,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 872,
            "text": "            \"attr_rate\": attr_rate,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 873,
            "text": "            \"mean_val\": mean_val,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 874,
            "text": "            \"min_val\": min_val,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 875,
            "text": "            \"max_val\": max_val,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 876,
            "text": "        })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 877
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 878,
            "text": "    if not group_stats:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 879,
            "text": "        print(\"⚠️ No group stats for CIF bar plots.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 880,
            "text": "        return None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 881
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 882,
            "text": "    # Sort by mean of variable (ascending). Fallback to group label order."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1007
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 22,
            "line": 821
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./obsolete_documents/cox_plot_helpers_4Mar.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.41459476947784424
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "def analyze_competing_risks(officer_data, group_col, title_suffix):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "    TRANSFORMATION 2: Competing Risks Analysis"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "    Shows the different ways officers can exit the promotion process:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "    - Promoted to Major (success)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "    - Left Army (attrition - competing risk)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "    - Administrative censoring (still in process)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "    print(f\"📊 Creating Competing Risks Analysis {title_suffix}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "    # Create competing risks visualization"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "    fig, ((ax1, ax2), (ax3, ax4)) = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "    # Plot 1: Cumulative Incidence by Outcome Type"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "    groups = officer_data[group_col].unique()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "    colors = plt.cm.Set1(np.linspace(0, 1, len(groups)))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "    for i, group in enumerate(groups):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "        group_data = officer_data[officer_data[group_col] == group]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "        if len(group_data) == 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "            continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "        # Calculate cumulative incidence"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "        promoted = group_data['event'].sum()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "        total = len(group_data)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "        promotion_rate = promoted / total"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "        # Simple bar chart for now (can be enhanced with time-dependent analysis)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "        ax1.bar([f'Group {group}'], [promotion_rate], color=colors[i], alpha=0.7)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "    ax1.set_title(f'Promotion Rates by Group {title_suffix}')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "    ax1.set_ylabel('Promotion Rate')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "    ax1.set_ylim(0, 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "    # Plot 2: Event Distribution"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "    event_counts = officer_data.groupby([group_col, 'event']).size().unstack(fill_value=0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "    event_counts.plot(kind='bar', ax=ax2, color=['red', 'green'])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "    ax2.set_title(f'Event Distribution {title_suffix}')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "    ax2.set_ylabel('Number of Officers')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    ax2.legend(['Not Promoted', 'Promoted'])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "    ax2.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=45)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "    # Plot 3: Time to Event Distribution"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "    for i, group in enumerate(groups):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "        group_data = officer_data[officer_data[group_col] == group]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "        if len(group_data) \u003e 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "            ax3.hist(group_data['survival_days'], alpha=0.6, label=f'Group {group}', "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "                    color=colors[i], bins=20)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497,
            "text": "    ax3.set_title(f'Time to Event Distribution {title_suffix}')"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 531
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 14,
            "line": 443
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./1-Various_PDE_and_Chat_stuff/2-cox_analysis/cox_flag.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4066660404205322
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 830,
            "text": "def plot_competing_risks_cif_bars("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 831,
            "text": "    plot_df,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 832,
            "text": "    plot_spec,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 833,
            "text": "    metadata,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 834,
            "text": "    output_dir=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 835,
            "text": "    filename_base=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 836,
            "text": "    dpi=400,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 837,
            "text": "    figsize=(10, 9),"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 838,
            "text": "    tick_sz=None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 839,
            "text": "    legend_outside=True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 840,
            "text": "):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 922
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 923
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 924,
            "text": "    def _build_hex_gradient(hex_colors, n_colors):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 925,
            "text": "        if not hex_colors:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 926,
            "text": "            return None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 927,
            "text": "        if len(hex_colors) == n_colors:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 928,
            "text": "            return hex_colors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 929,
            "text": "        if len(hex_colors) == 1:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 930,
            "text": "            return [hex_colors[0]] * n_colors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 931,
            "text": "        # Interpolate between first and last colors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 932,
            "text": "        start = _hex_to_rgb(hex_colors[0])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 933,
            "text": "        end = _hex_to_rgb(hex_colors[-1])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 934,
            "text": "        gradient = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 935,
            "text": "        for i in range(n_colors):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 936,
            "text": "            t = i / max(n_colors - 1, 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 937,
            "text": "            rgb = ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 938,
            "text": "                start[0] + (end[0] - start[0]) * t,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 939,
            "text": "                start[1] + (end[1] - start[1]) * t,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 940,
            "text": "                start[2] + (end[2] - start[2]) * t,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 941,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 942,
            "text": "            gradient.append(_rgb_to_hex(rgb))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 943,
            "text": "        return gradient"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 944
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945,
            "text": "    promo_palette = plot_spec.get(\"cif_bar_palette_promo\") or plot_spec.get(\"cif_bar_palette\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 946,
            "text": "    attr_palette = plot_spec.get(\"cif_bar_palette_attr\") or plot_spec.get(\"cif_bar_palette\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 948,
            "text": "    promo_palette = _build_hex_gradient(promo_palette or [\"#d7e6f5\", \"#1f5aa6\"], len(q_labels))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 949,
            "text": "    attr_palette = _build_hex_gradient(attr_palette or [\"#fde2cf\", \"#c0581a\"], len(q_labels))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 950
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 951,
            "text": "    # Build color maps aligned to ordered groups so bar colors match CR curves"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 952,
            "text": "    ordered_groups = [gs[\"group\"] for gs in group_stats]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 953,
            "text": "    promo_color_map = {g: promo_palette[i] for i, g in enumerate(ordered_groups)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 954,
            "text": "    attr_color_map = {g: attr_palette[i] for i, g in enumerate(ordered_groups)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 955,
            "text": "    promo_colors = [promo_color_map.get(gs[\"group\"], \"#4c4c4c\") for gs in group_stats]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 956,
            "text": "    attr_colors = [attr_color_map.get(gs[\"group\"], \"#4c4c4c\") for gs in group_stats]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 958,
            "text": "    promo_df = pd.DataFrame({\"bin\": q_labels, \"cif\": promo_vals})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 959,
            "text": "    attr_df = pd.DataFrame({\"bin\": q_labels, \"cif\": attr_vals})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 960,
            "text": "    promo_df[\"bin\"] = pd.Categorical(promo_df[\"bin\"], categories=q_labels, ordered=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 961,
            "text": "    attr_df[\"bin\"] = pd.Categorical(attr_df[\"bin\"], categories=q_labels, ordered=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 962
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 963,
            "text": "    if _SEABORN_AVAILABLE:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 964,
            "text": "        sns.barplot"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1072
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 829
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./cox_plot_helpers.py",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "endPosition": {
                "column": 5,
                "line": 841
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 830
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "score": 0.4052532911300659
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509,
            "text": "    # === EXAMPLE PLOT SPECIFICATIONS ==="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "    # Uncomment and modify these examples to create your own plots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "    # Copy the examples below into the 'plots' list to activate them"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "    # EXAMPLE 1: KAPLAN-MEIER PLOT - TB Ratio by Year Group"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "    # Kaplan-Meier plots show survival curves (probability of NOT being promoted over time)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "    # This example groups officers by year group and shows how TB ratio affects promotion"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "    # {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,
            "text": "    #     'name': 'km_tb_ratio_by_yg',                    # Unique plot name (used internally and in metadata)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520,
            "text": "    #                                                      # NOTE: Actual filename is auto-generated with enhanced description"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Format: {plot_type}_{variable}_{group_by}_{bins}_{method}_{filter}_{dates}.png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Example: km_cum_tb_rcvd_ratio_snr_by_yg_b3_q_all_2000-2022.png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Use descriptive names: km_ = Kaplan-Meier, cr_ = Competing Risks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "    #     'variable': 'cum_tb_rcvd_ratio_snr',           # Variable to analyze (MUST be in COLUMN_CONFIG time_varying_cols or static_cols)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526,
            "text": "    #                                                      # This is the variable that will be binned/grouped"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to group by 'group_by' without analyzing a variable"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    #     'group_by': 'yg',                               # Grouping variable (creates separate survival curves per group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be same as 'variable' or different (e.g., group by year group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to bin 'variable' without additional grouping"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Must be a column in your data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "    #     'plot_type': 'kaplan_meier',                    # Plot type: 'kaplan_meier' (single event) or 'competing_risks' (multiple events)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Kaplan-Meier: Shows probability of promotion over time (single curve per group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Competing Risks: Shows both promotion AND attrition probabilities (2 subplots)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538,
            "text": "    #     'bin_continuous': True,                         # Set True to bin continuous variables into groups (e.g., Low/Med/High)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Required for continuous variables (more than ~10 unique values)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set False for categorical variables (yg, sex, prestige_unit, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542,
            "text": "    #     'n_bins': 3,                                    # Number of bins to create (e.g., 3 = Low/Med/High)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "    #                                                      # For quantile method: creates equal-sized groups (33rd, 66th percentiles)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544,
            "text": "    #                                                      # For equal_width method: creates equal-width bins across value range"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "    #     'bin_method': 'quantile',                       # Binning method: 'quantile' (equal-sized groups) or 'equal_width' (equal-width bins)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "    #                                                      # 'quantile': Divides data into n_bins groups with equal numbers of officers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "    #                                                      #            Better for skewed distributions (most officers in one range)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "    #                                                      # 'equal_width': Divides value range into n_bins equal-width bins"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 550,
            "text": "    #                                                      #               Better for uniform distributions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 552,
            "text": "    #     'min_group_size': 50,                           # Minimum number of officers per group (groups smaller than this are excluded)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 553,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Prevents plots with too few data points (unreliable estimates)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 554,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Adjust based on your sample size (larger datasets can use higher thresholds)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 555,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 556,
            "text": "    #     'use_time_varying': True,                       # Use time-varying values (True) or static values (False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557,
            "text": "    #                                                      # True: Uses value at each snapshot (for time-varying variables like OER metrics)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 558,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Aggregates to officer-level using LAST snapshot value"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 559,
            "text": "    #                                                      # False: Uses value at last snapshot only (for static analysis)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 560,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Default: True (recommended for time-varying variables)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 561,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562,
            "text": "    #     'filter_zero_oer': True,                        # Filter out officers with NO OER data (NaN values)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 563,
            "text": "    #                                                      # True: Excludes officers who have NaN for OER variables (no OER records)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Keeps officers with OER data but 0 top blocks (valid data, just low performance)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565,
            "text": "    #                                                      # False: Includes all officers (may have many NaN values if OER data is sparse)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Only applies if 'variable' is an OER-related variable (checked automatically)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568,
            "text": "    #     'filter_nan_variable': False,                   # If True, drop rows where the plotted variable is NaN"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Use this to remove the 'nan' bin entirely"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Applies regardless of filter_zero_oer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572,
            "text": "    #     'x_max_days': None,                             # Optional: cap x-axis at N days (trims long-tail outliers)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,
            "text": "    #     # OPTIONAL: Bin the group_by column separately (for 3x3, 4x2, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "    #     'bin_group_by': False,                          # Set True to bin the group_by variable as well"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576,
            "text": "    #     'group_bins': 3,                                # Number of bins for group_by (defaults to n_bins)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577,
            "text": "    #     'group_bin_method': 'quantile',                 # Binning method for group_by (defaults to bin_method)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578,
            "text": "    # },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "    # EXAMPLE 2: COMPETING RISKS PLOT - Prestige Unit Effect"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583,
            "text": "    # Competing risks plots show TWO curves: promotion probability AND attrition probability"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584,
            "text": "    # This example compares officers in prestige units vs. non-prestige units"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 585,
            "text": "    # {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 586,
            "text": "    #     'name': 'cr_prestige_unit',                     # Unique plot name (cr_ prefix indicates competing risks)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 587,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 588,
            "text": "    #     'variable': 'prestige_unit',                    # Variable to analyze (binary: 0 = not prestige, 1 = prestige)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to group by 'group_by'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 590,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 591,
            "text": "    #     'group_by': 'prestige_unit',                    # Group by same variable (creates 2 groups: 0 and 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 592,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Each group gets its own pair of curves (promotion + attrition)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 593,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to bin 'variable'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595,
            "text": "    #     'plot_type': 'competing_risks',                 # Competing risks shows BOTH promotion (event=1) AND attrition (event=2)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Creates 2 subplots: top = promotion CIF, bottom = attrition CIF"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 597,
            "text": "    #                                                      # CIF = Cumulative Incidence Function (probability of event by time t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 598,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Useful for understanding trade-offs (promotion vs. leaving)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 599,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 600,
            "text": "    #     'bin_continuous': False,                        # No binning needed for binary variable (already 0 or 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 601,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set False for categorical variables (yg, sex, prestige_unit, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 602,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set True only for continuous variables (ratios, counts, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 603,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 604,
            "text": "    #     'n_bins': 3,                                    # Ignored when bin_continuous=False, but must be present"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 605,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 606,
            "text": "    #     'bin_method': 'quantile',                       # Ignored when bin_continuous=False, but must be present"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 607,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 608,
            "text": "    #     'min_group_size': 50,                           # Minimum officers per group (excludes groups smaller than this)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 609,
            "text": "    #                                                      # For binary variables, both groups should meet this threshold"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 611,
            "text": "    #     'use_time_varying': True,                       # Use time-varying values (prestige_unit can change over time)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 612,
            "text": "    #                                                      # True: Officer can move in/out of prestige units"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 613,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Uses last snapshot value when aggregating to officer-level"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 614,
            "text": "    #                                                      # False: Uses prestige_unit at last snapshot only"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 615,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 616,
            "text": "    #     'filter_zero_oer': False,                       # Not applicable for prestige_unit (not an OER variable)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 617,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set False for non-OER variables"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 618,
            "text": "    # },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 619,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 620,
            "text": "    # === ACTIVE PLOTS ==="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 621,
            "text": "    # Add your plot specifications here (uncomment examples above or create new ones)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 622,
            "text": "    # Each plot dictionary will generate:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 623,
            "text": "    #   - A plot file in the plot_dir directory (with descriptive auto-generated filename)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 624,
            "text": "    #   - A metadata JSON file alongside the plot (with complete configuration and data stats)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 625,
            "text": "    'plots': ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 626,
            "text": "        # Add plot specifications here"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 627,
            "text": "        # Each plot is a dictionary with required keys:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 628,
            "text": "        #   - 'name': str (unique identifier, used internally and in metadata)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 629,
            "text": "        #              NOTE: Actual filename is auto-generated with enhanced description"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 630,
            "text": "        #   - 'variable': str or None (column name to analyze, must be in COLUMN_CONFIG, or None for grouping only)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 631,
            "text": "        #   - 'group_by': str or None (column name to group by, creates separate curves, or None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 632,
            "text": "        #   - 'plot_type': str ('kaplan_meier' or 'competing_risks')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 633,
            "text": "        #   - 'bin_continuous': bool (True for continuous variables, False for categorical)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 634,
            "text": "        #   - 'n_bins': int (number of bins, ignored if bin_continuous=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 635,
            "text": "        #   - 'bin_method': str ('quantile' or 'equal_width', ignored if bin_continuous=False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 636,
            "text": "        #   - 'min_group_size': int (minimum officers per group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 637,
            "text": "        #   - 'use_time_varying': bool (True for time-varying vars, False for static, default True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 638,
            "text": "        #   - 'filter_zero_oer': bool (True to exclude officers with no OER data, only for OER variables)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 639,
            "text": "        #   - 'filter_nan_variable': bool (True to drop rows where variable is NaN)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 640,
            "text": "        #   - 'x_max_days': int or None (cap x-axis at N days)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 641,
            "text": "        #   - 'bin_group_by': bool (True to bin group_by separately)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "text": "        #   - 'group_bins': int (number of bins for group_by, defaults to n_bins)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 643,
            "text": "        #   - 'group_bin_method': str ('quantile' or 'equal_width' for group_by)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 644,
            "text": "        #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 645,
            "text": "        # OUTPUT FILES:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 646,
            "text": "        #   - Plot: {plot_type}_{variable}_{group_by}_{bins}_{method}_{filter}_{dates}.png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 647,
            "text": "        #   - Metadata: {plot_type}_{variable}_{group_by}_{bins}_{method}_{filter}_{dates}_metadata.json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 648,
            "text": "    ],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 649,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 650
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 651
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 652,
            "text": "# ============================================================================"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 78,
            "line": 651
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 506
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./To_compress_and_upload/pipeline_config.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.39083194732666016
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1015,
            "text": "########################################################################################################################################"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1016,
            "text": "        {    # 2: Pool minus-mean (raw)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1017,
            "text": "            'variable': POOL_MINUS_MEAN_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1018,
            "text": "            'name': 'cr_' + POOL_MINUS_MEAN_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1019,
            "text": "            'group_by': None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1020,
            "text": "            'plot_type': 'competing_risks',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1021,
            "text": "            'bin_continuous': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1022,
            "text": "            'n_bins': 5,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1023,
            "text": "            'bin_method': 'quantile',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1024,
            "text": "            'min_group_size': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1025,
            "text": "            'use_time_varying': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1026,
            "text": "            'filter_zero_oer': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1027,
            "text": "            'filter_nan_variable': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1028,
            "text": "            'filter_nan_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1029,
            "text": "            'strict_equal_n': False,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1030,
            "text": "            'x_max_days': 4500,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1031,
            "text": "            'bin_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1032,
            "text": "            'group_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1033,
            "text": "            'group_bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1034,
            "text": "        },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1035,
            "text": "########################################################################################################################################"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1036,
            "text": "        {    # 7: Interaction (raw)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1037,
            "text": "            'variable': 'star_pool_interaction',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1038,
            "text": "            'name': 'cr_' + 'star_pool_interaction',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1039,
            "text": "            'group_by': None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1040,
            "text": "            'plot_type': 'competing_risks',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1041,
            "text": "            'bin_continuous': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1042,
            "text": "            'n_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1043,
            "text": "            'bin_method': 'quantile',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1044,
            "text": "            'min_group_size': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1045,
            "text": "            'use_time_varying': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1046,
            "text": "            'filter_zero_oer': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1047,
            "text": "            'filter_nan_variable': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1048,
            "text": "            'filter_nan_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1049,
            "text": "            'strict_equal_n': False,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1050,
            "text": "            'x_max_days': 4500,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1051,
            "text": "            'bin_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1052,
            "text": "            'group_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1053,
            "text": "            'group_bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1054,
            "text": "        },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1055,
            "text": "#######################################################################################################################################"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1056,
            "text": "#         {    # 10: TB ratio (backward)"
          },
          {

            "text": "#             'variable': TB_RATIO_BWD_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1058,
            "text": "#             'name': 'cr_' + TB_RATIO_BWD_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1059,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1060,

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1070,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1071,
            "text": "#             'bin_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1072,
            "text": "#             'group_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1073,
            "text": "#             'group_bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1074,
            "text": "#         },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1075,
            "text": "# ########################################################################################################################################"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1076,
            "text": "#         {    # 15: Plot TB ratio vs rank norm"
          },
          {

            "text": "#             'variable': TB_RATIO_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1078,
            "text": "#             'name': 'cr_' + TB_RATIO_SNR_COL + '_vs_' + POOL_TB_RATIO_RANK_PCT_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1079,
            "text": "#             'group_by': POOL_TB_RATIO_RANK_PCT_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1080,
            "text": "#             'plot_type': 'competing_risks',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1081,
            "text": "#             'bin_continuous': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1082,
            "text": "#             'n_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1083,
            "text": "#             'bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1084,
            "text": "#             'min_group_size': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1085,

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1088,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1089,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1090,
            "text": "#             'x_max_days': 4500,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1091,
            "text": "#             'bin_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1092,
            "text": "#             'group_bins': 3,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1093,
            "text": "#             'group_bin_method': 'equal_width',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1094,
            "text": "#         },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1095,
            "text": "# #######################################################################################################################################"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1096,
            "text": "#         {    # 16: Pool TB ratio percentile (0-1, 1.0 = best)"
          },
          {

            "text": "#             'variable': POOL_TB_RATIO_RANK_PCT_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1098,
            "text": "#             'name': 'cr_' + POOL_TB_RATIO_RANK_PCT_SNR_COL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1099,
            "text": "#             'group_by': None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1100,

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1103,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1104,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1105,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1106,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1107,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1108,
            "text": "#             'filter_nan_group_by': True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1109,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1110,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1111,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1113,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1118,
            "text": "# === 7.1. MODEL DEFAULTS FROM PLOT CONFIG ==="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1119,
            "text": "# ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1120,
            "text": "# Build plot_cols from PLOT_CONFIG['plots'] and use them as the default model"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 77,
            "line": 1119
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 10,
            "line": 1013

        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./pipeline_config.py",

      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 850,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 851,
            "text": "    # === EXAMPLE PLOT SPECIFICATIONS ==="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 852,
            "text": "    # Uncomment and modify these examples to create your own plots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 853,
            "text": "    # Copy the examples below into the 'plots' list to activate them"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 854,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 855,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 856,
            "text": "    # EXAMPLE 1: KAPLAN-MEIER PLOT - TB Ratio by Year Group"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 857,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 858,
            "text": "    # Kaplan-Meier plots show survival curves (probability of NOT being promoted over time)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 859,
            "text": "    # This example groups officers by year group and shows how TB ratio affects promotion"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 860,
            "text": "    # {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 861,
            "text": "    #     'name': 'km_tb_ratio_by_yg',                    # Unique plot name (used internally and in metadata)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 862,
            "text": "    #                                                      # NOTE: Actual filename is auto-generated with enhanced description"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 863,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Format: {plot_type}_{variable}_{group_by}_{bins}_{method}_{filter}_{dates}.png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 864,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Example: km_tb_ratio_bwd_snr_by_yg_b3_q_all_2000-2022.png"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 865,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Use descriptive names: km_ = Kaplan-Meier, cr_ = Competing Risks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 866,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 867,
            "text": "    #     'variable': 'tb_ratio_bwd_snr',                # Variable to analyze (MUST be in COLUMN_CONFIG time_varying_cols or static_cols)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 868,
            "text": "    #                                                      # This is the variable that will be binned/grouped"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 869,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to group by 'group_by' without analyzing a variable"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 870,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 871,
            "text": "    #     'group_by': 'yg',                               # Grouping variable (creates separate survival curves per group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 872,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be same as 'variable' or different (e.g., group by year group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 873,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to bin 'variable' without additional grouping"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 874,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Must be a column in your data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 875,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 876,
            "text": "    #     'plot_type': 'kaplan_meier',                    # Plot type: 'kaplan_meier' (single event) or 'competing_risks' (multiple events)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 877,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Kaplan-Meier: Shows probability of promotion over time (single curve per group)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 878,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Competing Risks: Shows both promotion AND attrition probabilities (2 subplots)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 879,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 880,
            "text": "    #     'bin_continuous': True,                         # Set True to bin continuous variables into groups (e.g., Low/Med/High)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 881,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Required for continuous variables (more than ~10 unique values)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 882,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set False for categorical variables (yg, sex, prestige_unit, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 883,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 884,
            "text": "    #     'n_bins': 3,                                    # Number of bins to create (e.g., 3 = Low/Med/High)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 885,
            "text": "    #                                                      # For quantile method: creates equal-sized groups (33rd, 66th percentiles)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 886,
            "text": "    #                                                      # For equal_width method: creates equal-width bins across value range"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 887,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 888,
            "text": "    #     'bin_method': 'quantile',                       # Binning method: 'quantile' (equal-sized groups) or 'equal_width' (equal-width bins)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 889,
            "text": "    #                                                      # 'quantile': Divides data into n_bins groups with equal numbers of officers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 890,
            "text": "    #                                                      #            Better for skewed distributions (most officers in one range)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 891,
            "text": "    #                                                      # 'equal_width': Divides value range into n_bins equal-width bins"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 892,
            "text": "    #                                                      #               Better for uniform distributions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 893,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 894,
            "text": "    #     'min_group_size': 50,                           # Minimum number of officers per group (groups smaller than this are excluded)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 895,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Prevents plots with too few data points (unreliable estimates)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 896,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Adjust based on your sample size (larger datasets can use higher thresholds)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 897,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 898,
            "text": "    #     'use_time_varying': True,                       # Use time-varying values (True) or static values (False)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 899,
            "text": "    #                                                      # True: Uses value at each snapshot (for time-varying variables like OER metrics)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 900,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Aggregates to officer-level using LAST snapshot value"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 901,
            "text": "    #                                                      # False: Uses value at last snapshot only (for static analysis)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 902,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Default: True (recommended for time-varying variables)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 903,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 904,
            "text": "    #     'filter_zero_oer': True,                        # Filter out officers with NO OER data (NaN values)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 905,
            "text": "    #                                                      # True: Excludes officers who have NaN for OER variables (no OER records)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 906,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Keeps officers with OER data but 0 top blocks (valid data, just low performance)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 907,
            "text": "    #                                                      # False: Includes all officers (may have many NaN values if OER data is sparse)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 908,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Only applies if 'variable' is an OER-related variable (checked automatically)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 909,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 910,
            "text": "    #     'filter_nan_variable': False,                   # If True, drop rows where the plotted variable is NaN"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 911,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Use this to remove the 'nan' bin entirely"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 912,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Applies regardless of filter_zero_oer"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 913,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 914,
            "text": "    #     'strict_equal_n': False,                        # Force equal-N bins using rank-based quantiles"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 915,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 916,
            "text": "    #     'x_max_days': None,                             # Optional: cap x-axis at N days (trims long-tail outliers)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 917,
            "text": "    #"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 918,
            "text": "    #     # OPTIONAL: Bin the group_by column separately (for 3x3, 4x2, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 919,
            "text": "    #     'bin_group_by': False,                          # Set True to bin the group_by variable as well"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 920,
            "text": "    #     'group_bins': 3,                                # Number of bins for group_by (defaults to n_bins)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 921,
            "text": "    #     'group_bin_method': 'quantile',                 # Binning method for group_by (defaults to bin_method)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 922,
            "text": "    # },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 923,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 924,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 925,
            "text": "    # EXAMPLE 2: COMPETING RISKS PLOT - Prestige Unit Effect"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 926,
            "text": "    # ========================================================================"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 927,
            "text": "    # Competing risks plots show TWO curves: promotion probability AND attrition probability"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 928,
            "text": "    # This example compares officers in prestige units vs. non-prestige units"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 929,
            "text": "    # {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 930,
            "text": "    #     'name': 'cr_prestige_unit',                     # Unique plot name (cr_ prefix indicates competing risks)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 931,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 932,
            "text": "    #     'variable': 'prestige_unit',                    # Variable to analyze (binary: 0 = not prestige, 1 = prestige)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 933,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to group by 'group_by'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 934,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 935,
            "text": "    #     'group_by': 'prestige_unit',                    # Group by same variable (creates 2 groups: 0 and 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 936,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Each group gets its own pair of curves (promotion + attrition)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 937,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Can be None if you just want to bin 'variable'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 938,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 939,
            "text": "    #     'plot_type': 'competing_risks',                 # Competing risks shows BOTH promotion (event=1) AND attrition (event=2)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 940,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Creates 2 subplots: top = promotion CIF, bottom = attrition CIF"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 941,
            "text": "    #                                                      # CIF = Cumulative Incidence Function (probability of event by time t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 942,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Useful for understanding trade-offs (promotion vs. leaving)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 943,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 944,
            "text": "    #     'bin_continuous': False,                        # No binning needed for binary variable (already 0 or 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set False for categorical variables (yg, sex, prestige_unit, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 946,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set True only for continuous variables (ratios, counts, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 948,
            "text": "    #     'n_bins': 3,                                    # Ignored when bin_continuous=False, but must be present"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 949,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 950,
            "text": "    #     'bin_method': 'quantile',                       # Ignored when bin_continuous=False, but must be present"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 951,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 952,
            "text": "    #     'min_group_size': 50,                           # Minimum officers per group (excludes groups smaller than this)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 953,
            "text": "    #                                                      # For binary variables, both groups should meet this threshold"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 954,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 955,
            "text": "    #     'use_time_varying': True,                       # Use time-varying values (prestige_unit can change over time)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 956,
            "text": "    #                                                      # True: Officer can move in/out of prestige units"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957,
            "text": "    #                                                      #       Uses last snapshot value when aggregating to officer-level"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 958,
            "text": "    #                                                      # False: Uses prestige_unit at last snapshot only"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 959,
            "text": "    #     "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 960,
            "text": "    #     'filter_zero_oer': False,                       # Not applicable for prestige_unit (not an OER variable)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 961,
            "text": "    #                                                      # Set False for non-OER variables"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 962,
            "text": "    # },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 963,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 964,
            "text": "    # === ACTIVE PLOTS ==="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 965,
            "text": "    # Add your plot specifications here (uncomment examples above or create new ones)"
          },
